title: odontochilus urceolatus
intro: Odontochilus urceolatus, also known as the "Dwarf Upright Rattlesnake Plantain," is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Odontochilus urceolatus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make tea, infusions, and extracts that can be taken orally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
